name: Yae Miko *Body Swap*
description: Yae Miko is a playable 5-star Electro Catalyst user from the video game Genshin Impact, known for her role as the head priestess of the Grand Narukami Shrine and her mischievous, witty personality. In combat, she excels as an off-field Electro applicator and DPS, utilizing her Elemental Skill to summon totems that deal Electro damage and her Elemental Burst to unleash a powerful lightning strike. Her kit is flexible, allowing for builds that scale with both Attack and Elemental Mastery, and she is a strong character for various team compositions, particularly those focused on Electro-related reactions
creator: Mr.Body_Swap
